changes.title: 新增
items: Collab 新增 Git 历史搜索窗口，支持按文件/路径、正则、作者和日期范围搜索 commit 与 stash。
`unity_execute` 和 `unity_run_states` 的工具调用面板新增实时进度事件。
设置中新增隐藏 Git 终端命令候选项的显示开关。
Git Agent 新增通过知识工具检查 Locus 知识文档的能力。

changes.title: 修复
items: Git 终端现在以内联形式展示用户提问和工具确认。
修复推理强度保存逻辑，Session 与 Agent 的上下文强度不会覆盖用户默认选择。
修复 Unity 缺少 enum display name 时 `unity_yaml_read` 的序列化。
修复 Knowledge lexical rebuild 的小更新静默处理和大批量进度总量。
修复删除知识文档或目录后的选中状态清理。
Debug 模式下过滤第三方 TRACE 日志。
改进 `unity_yaml_read` 工具标题摘要，展示完整文件与对象路径。

changes.title: 移除
items: 移除 Claude 订阅 OAuth 登录入口，已登录账号仍可在设置中退出。

changes.title: Added
items: Added a Git history search window in Collab for searching commits and stashes by file/path query, regex, author, and date range.
Added live progress events for `unity_execute` and `unity_run_states` in chat tool call panels.
Added a display setting to hide Git terminal command suggestions.
Added knowledge inspection tools to the Git Agent.

changes.title: Fixed
items: Fixed Git terminal pending input by rendering ask-user and tool confirmation prompts inline.
Fixed saved reasoning effort handling so session and agent context changes keep the user's persisted default.
Fixed `unity_yaml_read` enum serialization when Unity does not provide enum display names.
Fixed Knowledge lexical rebuild progress for small single-document updates and large batch progress totals.
Fixed Knowledge selection cleanup after deleting documents or folders.
Filtered third-party TRACE logs while debug mode is enabled.
Improved `unity_yaml_read` tool header summaries with full file and object paths.

changes.title: Removed
items: Removed the Claude subscription OAuth sign-in entry point while keeping logout available for existing accounts.
